title: Mildly Pungent Irish Gobo-Burdock Bowl
description: A paleo-friendly, one-pan meal prep dish featuring gobo and burdock roots, with a hint of garlic and ginger. Perfect for a quick and nutritious breakfast or lunch.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the grated onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated garlic and ginger and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the grated gobo and burdock roots and cook, stirring occasionally, for 10-12 minutes, until tender.
Add the chopped kale and cook, stirring occasionally, until wilted, about 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer, covered, for 10-15 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
